summary: Comprehensive testing of SmartDesk ERP/CRM multi-tenant application. All 17 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests verified login flows, sidebar collapsible sections, Declarations module with all 6 sub-items, localStorage persistence, and card navigation. RLS multi-tenant isolation verified via API - demo-1 and demo-2 contacts are properly isolated with different companyIds.

issues: Demo-1 and Demo-2 have same contact names (Jean Dupont, Marie Claire, etc.) which may confuse users during testing - but this is expected seed data behavior, not a bug

critical_code_review_comments: RLS isolation is working correctly - all tenant tables have proper policies
Authentication flow is secure with bcrypt password hashing and JWT tokens
Session management includes database validation and expiry checks
Cross-tenant attacks (delete, spoofing) are properly blocked by RLS
seed_data_creation: Existing seed data used - demo-1 has 4 contacts, demo-2 has 4 contacts (same names but different IDs/companyIds)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs and frontend UI flows are working correctly. RLS multi-tenant isolation is verified. The Declarations module is a UI placeholder (no backend integration yet). Sidebar collapsible sections work with localStorage persistence. Test file created at /app/backend/tests/test_smartdesk_api.py covers auth, RLS isolation, cross-tenant attacks, admin endpoints.

frontend: Login page loads correctly with email/password inputs
Super admin login → dashboard with sidebar
Demo-1 login → TechCorp Demo CRM with 4 contacts
Demo-2 login → GreenEnergy Demo CRM with 4 contacts (different companyId)
Declarations dashboard with 4 module cards (DGID, CNSS, INS, Greffe)
Declarations Calendar page with chronological deadlines
Declarations DGID page with 'Déclarations en cours' and 'Échéances types'
Card navigation from dashboard to module pages
